name: AutopilotMission
description: A task or action queued by a department for Autopilot approval and execution

source_department.description: The department that requested the mission (e.g., Freelance Station, Crypto Observatory)

mission_type.description: The type of action (e.g., JOB_APPLICATION, TRADE_EXECUTION, OUTREACH)

requested_action.description: The specific technical action to perform

permission_id.description: Optional reference to an active permission grant

status.description: pending, approved, denied, executed, failed, cancelled

current_step_index.description: The current active step index for sequential missions

total_steps.description: The total number of steps in the mission sequence

next_action.description: Short label describing the next expected action

trigger_source_id.description: Optional reference to the record that triggered this mission
